title: StoryContract
description: Issued by the Supervisor to gate a story. The Developer must not begin patch work without a valid contract. This is the inner loop's starting gun.

contract_version.description: Bump when the Supervisor reissues after scope change

task_class.description: Used by the Model Provider Gateway for cost-aware routing

objective.description: One paragraph: what done looks like

pre_conditions.description: All of these must be true before the Developer starts. Orchestrator verifies.

allowed_write_set.description: Glob patterns. The Permission Gateway enforces this; the Developer cannot write outside it.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable criteria. The Validator checks these; the Developer cannot self-certify completion.

validation_commands.description: Exact commands the Validator runs. Must be deterministic and exit-code reliable.

attempt_budget.description: Max develop<->debug cycles. Orchestrator enforces this; the Developer cannot override.

human_gate_required_for.description: Boundary crossings that force escalate_human. Detected deterministically by the Orchestrator.

rollback_notes.description: How to undo this story's changes if validation fails

failure_gene_ids.description: Active warning bank gene ids whose matching_signal fired for this story's context. Injected before the first Developer turn.

env_snapshot_ref.description: Path to the env snapshot captured at loop start

context_impact.description: Expected effect on context window size (tokens)
